requirements.requirement: Bind all work to the completed M1 exact head.
requirements.action: Create an isolated M2 branch from ad5229bbaca3cf8ae692ecb09f54220cde1db16b.
requirements.pass_criterion: M2 branch starts exactly at the M1 head.

requirements.requirement: Preserve the existing full-offline installation architecture while upgrading to a supported official Windows Python runtime.
requirements.action: Pin the official Python 3.13.14 Windows x64 full installer and its official SHA-256 without switching installer methods.
requirements.test: Static pin scan plus official digest comparison.
requirements.pass_criterion: All authoritative runtime pins resolve to Python 3.13.14 and the exact approved installer digest.

requirements.requirement: Use the current approved timezone fallback package.
requirements.action: Pin tzdata 2026.3 wheel and its exact SHA-256.
requirements.evidence: Source diff and official package digest.
requirements.pass_criterion: No authoritative tzdata 2026.2 pin remains in active build/install paths.

requirements.requirement: Find every authoritative and stale runtime/dependency reference before patching.
requirements.action: Inventory Python version, runtime URL/hash, tzdata version/hash and package metadata references.
requirements.test: Repository-wide static search with allow-listed historical evidence handling.
requirements.pass_criterion: Every active reference is classified as update, preserve-history or remove.

requirements.requirement: Update all active build, install, requirements and manifest surfaces consistently.
requirements.action: Apply a minimal coherent patch without architecture rewrite.
requirements.pass_criterion: No mixed active runtime or tzdata baseline remains.

requirements.requirement: Dependency acquisition must fail closed on byte mismatch.
requirements.action: Preserve or strengthen exact hash verification for Python and tzdata artifacts.
requirements.pass_criterion: Incorrect runtime or wheel bytes cannot be admitted.

requirements.requirement: The source tree must execute under Python 3.13.
requirements.action: Run compile and the complete repository source suite with Python 3.13.
requirements.pass_criterion: All mandatory source tests pass on the final exact head.

requirements.requirement: The upgraded dependencies must pass admission checks.
requirements.action: Run Foundation CI and OSS Admission CI on the final exact head.
requirements.pass_criterion: Foundation and OSS Admission both pass.

requirements.requirement: M2 must not change product behaviour or the approved UI.
requirements.action: Limit changes to runtime/dependency/build metadata, tests and evidence.
requirements.pass_criterion: No financial formula, UI layout or recommendation policy change.

requirements.action: Keep Gatekeeper disconnected, Ozon deferred and marketplace writes disabled.
requirements.pass_criterion: No prohibited integration or write path is enabled.

requirements.requirement: Do not overclaim packaged or installed evidence.
requirements.action: Restrict M2 claims to source/runtime verification.
requirements.pass_criterion: No installer, L4 or L5 PASS claim is made by M2.

requirements.requirement: Publish a clean exact-head M2 candidate.
requirements.action: Remove staging files and record exact ancestry, diff and workflow evidence.
requirements.evidence: Final M2 manifest and draft PR.
requirements.pass_criterion: Clean source candidate with complete M2 evidence and no merge/release.
